differential_diagnoses: Pseudoaneurysm of the internal carotid or ascending pharyngeal artery
Head and neck squamous cell carcinoma
next_steps: Immediate CT angiography or MR angiography to evaluate for vascular etiology
Avoid further blind aspiration or incision in the clinic setting
Urgent consultation with interventional radiology and vascular surgery
Careful, controlled incisional biopsy in the operating room with airway protection and ready access for hemostasis
Histopathological and immunohistochemical analysis of biopsy tissue
